name: marrow
description: MARROW — a sovereign, agent-native back-office on an append-only event-sourced substrate (the Mark).

scripts.db:up: docker rm -f marrow-pg >/dev/null 2>&1; docker run -d --name marrow-pg -e POSTGRES_PASSWORD=marrow -e POSTGRES_DB=marrow_test -p 55432:5432 postgres:17-alpine
